question: Does the exact BTC-selected short-side carry-conditioned 20/30/60/90-day Donchian rule transfer to ETHUSDT perpetual with stable realistic-cost profitability?
intended_claim: product consideration for an existing Demo instrument only after all sequential gates
known_exposure: The rule was selected after BTC development outcomes. ETH prices have been viewed by other strategies, but this exact rule has not been run on ETH. Evidence is fixed-method instrument transfer plus sequential time gates, not virgin-market-data confirmation.

fixed_candidate.direction_source: equal mean of stateful long-short components
fixed_candidate.carry_rule: negative target becomes zero when prior completed UTC-day realized funding cashflow is negative; long target is unchanged
fixed_candidate.exit: component midpoint trailing exit that never moves against position

selection_bias.columns: six BTC Donchian, three BTC carry-conditioned, one BTC Spot transfer, one ETH transfer

development_gate: base and stress total returns positive
at least two of 2021/2022/2023 positive and worst year at least -5%
base Sharpe and Calmar both exceed ETH pure long-short and pure long-only
evaluation_gate: base and stress total returns positive
base Sharpe and Calmar both exceed ETH pure long-short and pure long-only
confirmation_gate: base and stress total returns non-negative
evaluation plus confirmation base and stress CAGR above 4%
allowed_fixes_after_checkpoint: Only code, serialization, data-integrity or documentation corrections that preserve the fixed rule, periods, costs, related-trial accounting and gates. Record fixes and refresh code hash before opening another phase.
opening_rule: Run development only. Evaluation requires evaluation_authorized=true; confirmation requires confirmation_authorized=true.
